zh.lifeSummary: Miss Livermore於大約1070年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可格亞特 利福莫。她於大約1095年與Walter Drury of Horningsheath在英國素福爾可格亞特 安德 蕾托 霍尼亞斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Livermore
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: probably a habitational name from Livermere in Suffolk. This is first found in the form Leuuremer (c. 1050), which suggests derivation from Old English lǣfer ‘rush, reed’ + mere ‘lake’. However, later forms consistently show i in the first syllable, suggesting Old English lifer ‘liver’, referring either to the shape of the pond or to the coagulation of the water.

en.lifeSummary: Miss Livermore was born about 1070, in Great Livermere, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. She married Walter Drury of Horningsheath about 1095, in Great and Little Horningsheath, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son.
